evals.expected_output: Structured findings table with scored deduplicated findings across multiple angles. Diff fetched via gh pr diff. Logbook written to ~/logbooks/code-review/pr-4.sqlite and ~/logbooks/code-review/pr-4.jsonl. Angles derived from the actual PR diff.

Security findings: hardcoded JWT secret, SQL injection in 3 places, plaintext password comparison, token logged to console. Performance: N+1 query for permissions. Test-quality: no tests. Correctness: missing null checks, missing auth middleware. All scored and written to logbook.

evals.prompt: Review the changes on the current branch
evals.expected_output: Low-severity findings for version bump and docs changes. Branch slug used in logbook path. Angles limited to maintainability and correctness (docs-only diff, few heuristic matches).
